title: Activation
description: Participants begin the investigation by orienting themselves to the learning environment, identifying initial evidence, and developing early collaborative interpretations.

facilitatorGuidance.openingPrompt: What patterns or inconsistencies immediately stand out to your group?
facilitatorGuidance.stallPrompt: What evidence have you not discussed yet?
facilitatorGuidance.reflectionPrompt: What assumptions did your group make during your first interpretation?
